title: Huawei S310S-10PN4JX Gigabit PoE switch, 8x GPOE, 2x 2.5G POE, 2x 2.5G SFP, 2x SFP+
description: Huawei S310S-10PN4JX is a manageable L2+ switch equipped with 6x 1Gbit Ethernet with PoE+ support, 1x 1Gbit ethernet, 2x 1G/2.5G ethernet s podporou PoE+, 2x 2.5G SFP and 2x SFP+ ports . The total PoE budget is 128W , ensuring reliable power for 8 devices under the 802.3af standard or 4 devices under the 802.3at standard with full power consumption. It supports all common L2 functions and additionally offers static routing and a DHCPv4 server. Management is possible through a web interface or… Advanced Protection Technology: In addition to supporting traditional Spanning Tree Protocol (STP) and Rapid Spanning Tree Protocol (RSTP), eKitEngine S310S is designed with the industry's latest Ethernet Ring Protection Switching (ERPS) technology defined in ITU-T G.8032, which implements millisecond-level protection switching based on traditional Ethernet MAC and bridging functions Diversified Security Control: eKitEngine S310S provides comprehensive defense against DoS attacks and user-targeted attacks. It sets up and maintains a DHCP snooping binding table and discards packets that do not match the table entries. The DHCP snooping trusted port feature ensures that users connect only to an authorized DHCP server PoE Power Supply: The Perpetual PoE feature ensures that when a PoE switch restarts (e.g., during software upgrade), it continues to supply power to the connected PDs, ensuring uninterrupted power supply Smart Upgrade: Based on Huawei Online Upgrade Repository (HOUP) , eKitEngine S310S supports smart upgrades. The automated upgrade process supports one-click upgrade and…
